calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-15-2004 Continued To Jan-20-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-20-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Janet Pond.
Arnold Evje II, Esq., for Plaintiff: H.A. Sinh.
No appearance by the Defendant: John Redding.
09:25 am. - Plaintiff's witness, H.A. Sinh was sworn and direct examined by counsel.
PLTF EXH #1 - Three day notice --------------- ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for restitution and possession of the premises at: 51 Sixth St., #704, San Francisco.
Back rent and unlawful detainer damages total of $3,042.24 (per diem hold over of $21.42).
Costs of $148.30
Rental agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibit.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-20-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Arnold Walter Evje, Esq. for Plaintiff
No appearance by Defendant


Unlawful detainer settlement conference off calendar. No appearance by Defendant. Jury demand stricken. Set for court trial Clerk: Marjorie Schwartz-Scott Not reported. (218)
